app.title: Spain Cadastre
app.subtitle: Integration with the Spanish Cadastre for Nekazari

info.activeDesc: This module lets you add cadastral parcels with a single click from the entities page. Click on the map to query the cadastre and automatically add the parcel.

features.oneClick: Add parcels with one click on the map
features.regions: Support for multiple regions (Spain, Navarra, Basque Country)

geosearch.placeholder: Search city, province or postal code...

dialogs.multipleSubtitle: Select the entity you want to import

status.slowService: The service is taking longer than usual

warnings.noGeometry: The selected entity has no geometry available for this operation.
warnings.alreadyExists: Parcel {{ref}} already exists in your entities.

errors.timeout: The cadastral service is taking longer than usual. Please try again.
errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your connection.
errors.notFound: No cadastral information was found for this location.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The cadastral service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
